records.proposedRule: retain until account deletion; manual recovery exports, if created, are access-restricted and removed within seven days

records.currentRule: user deletion and account deletion available
records.proposedRule: retain until item or account deletion; users must retain local copies of material they need to preserve

records.currentRule: Supabase Storage S3 active and quarantine paths; Storage API deletion is permanent and S3 object versioning is unavailable
records.proposedRule: retain while the user keeps the item; remove active and quarantine objects within 24 hours of user/account deletion or terminal scan failure; do not promise recovery of deleted objects

records.currentRule: 365 days unless an incident or legal requirement justifies longer retention
records.proposedRule: 365 days unless incident/legal requirement needs longer
at least two years if PIPEDA applies, subject to counsel

records.class: provider, email, connector, infrastructure logs and backups
records.currentRule: Supabase Free has no automatic daily database backup; manual export/restore was exercised on 2026-07-18. Storage objects are not versioned. Provider-native logs follow applicable provider terms.
records.proposedRule: manual recovery exports, if created, are access-restricted and removed within seven days; no continuous RPO/RTO or deleted-object recovery commitment
records.automated: no for database recovery export; provider-managed for operational logs
